patch.value: Extension install should scaffold newly required item-type folders (pm health ok:false after installing pm-kanban until pm init)

2026-07-04 sandbox audit: installing pm-kanban registers the Card type whose cards/ folder does not exist yet, so pm health returns top-level ok:false (warn-severity storage check) until the user re-runs pm init. Remediation hint is correct but install should auto-create type dirs (declarative installs already scaffold folders when activation succeeds — see pm-3wsi).
Installing an extension that requires new item-type folders scaffolds them automatically so pm health stays ok without a manual pm init.

## Context
2026-07-04 sandbox audit: installing pm-kanban registers the Card item type, but its cards/ folder is not created, so pm health returns top-level ok:false (warn-severity storage check) until the user re-runs pm init. The remediation hint is correct but the install should self-heal.

## Approach
After successful package install/activation, scaffold storage folders for every newly registered item type (same code path pm init uses). Declarative installs already do this when activation succeeds — reuse that scaffolding for package installs. Note pm-3wsi covers the adjacent case where FAILED activation skips scaffolding with a misleading report; this item is the success-path gap.

## Definition of done
Fresh sandbox: install pm-kanban → pm health ok:true immediately, cards/ exists; spec asserts type-folder scaffolding for package installs; no regression for extension types with custom directories.

value.text: Implementation start 2026-07-23: selected after live 1,922-item all-status inventory, full canonical metadata/history review, and GitHub/release/security reconciliation. This item is actively edited in one coherent SDK/package authoring wave spanning scaffold contracts, flag arity, install validation, activation freshness, schema storage, renderer ownership, and public documentation; no duplicate item was created.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Live reconciliation evidence 2026-07-23: current main already implements scaffoldInstalledExtensionItemTypes in src/sdk/extension.ts, invoked after successful runtime activation for project installs, and tests/unit/extensions/extension-command.spec.ts proves installing the kanban schema package creates cards/. git blame/log trace the implementation to ec3f0ee99 / PR #568. Focused extension-command suite passed today (134/134), including the item-folder install acceptance. This item was stale-open, not outstanding implementation.

patch.value: Already shipped by PR #568 (ec3f0ee99): successful project package installs scaffold contributed item-type folders; live focused suite passed 134/134 including kanban cards/ acceptance.
